subcodes.first_line: O enkindled flame of the love of God! Thy letter was soul-stirring, and thy sighs and lamentations set aflame the hearts [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای شعله افروخته محبت الله نامه تو جانسوز بود و آه و فغانت آتش افروز حین
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @praise and encouragement
